faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.subheading: Find quick answers to the most common support questions

contactBox.title: Still Have Questions?
contactBox.text: Still have questions? Feel free to get in touch with us today!

questions.question: What types of processes can you automate?
questions.answer: We specialize in automating repetitive workflows across operations, marketing, sales, and customer support using AI and custom logic.

questions.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use your service?
questions.answer: Not at all. We handle the technical implementation from end to end, providing you with simple, ready-to-use interfaces.

questions.question: Can you integrate with our existing tools?
questions.answer: Yes, we integrate seamlessly with most popular CRMs, marketing platforms, and operational tools through APIs and webhooks.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Depending on complexity, typical implementations range from 2 to 6 weeks, including testing and team training.

questions.question: Is your AI secure and compliant?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Security is our top priority. We use enterprise-grade encryption and adhere strictly to industry data compliance standards.
